items.name: NPSC – PGT, Lecturer and More – 178 Posts
items.qualification: Any Bachelors Degree, B.Ed, Any Post Graduate, M.A, M.Ed, M.Phil/Ph.D

basic_details.job_title: NPSC CESE Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 178 PGT, Lecturer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: NPSC CESE Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 178 vacancies for PGT, Lecturer and More posts. Candidates can apply online only from 12.05.2026 to 02.06.2026 through NPSC website npsc.nagaland.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Higher Education, Higher Education (Hr. Education), School Education, Technical Education, SCERT - Govt. of Nagaland

qualification.education_qualification: Any Bachelors Degree, B.Ed, Any Post Graduate, M.A, M.Ed, M.Phil/Ph.D

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the NPSC portal at https://npsc.nagaland.gov.in. No hard copy applications will be accepted. The OTR (One Time Registration) starts from 12-05-2026 (Noon) and closes on 02-06-2026 (Noon). Candidates who have previously completed the OTR process may directly submit the online application. Candidates are requested to complete OTR at the earliest to avoid online traffic/complications due to last-minute submission.

items.name: Nagaland University – Non Teaching Posts – 13 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Nagaland University Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 13 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Nagaland University Recruitment 2026 for 13 posts of Non-Teaching. Candidates with Master's Degree, Bachelor's Degree, Diploma, 10+2, HSLC Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 13-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Nagaland University official website.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Nagaland University Various Posts Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.short_information: Nagaland University Recruitment 2026 for 3 posts of Project Staff. Candidates with BA, MA Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 24-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Nagaland University official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate in Social Science with minimum 55% marks for Research Assistant. Graduate in Social Science with minimum 55% marks for Field Investigators.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- per month, Rs. 20,000/- per month
